news-global-econ.title: Investors looking for shelter from AI storm are turning to India
news-global-econ.description: With the artificial intelligence frenzy roiling benchmark gauges from Asia to the US, the NSE Nifty 50 Index is becoming a safe haven of sorts for global investors

news-global-econ.title: New Jersey coastal city clashes over proposal to transform amusement park into luxury hotel
news-global-econ.description: A 5-2 council vote rezoned the former Gillian's Wonderland Pier site for rehabilitation, but a planned lawsuit challenges the boardwalk hotel proposal.

news-global-econ.title: America's next 250 years begin in the classroom
news-global-econ.description: The Education Freedom Tax Credit launching in 2027 could reshape school choice by empowering charitable giving to fund scholarship organizations.

news-global-econ.title: Trump marks America's 250th birthday with Mount Rushmore speech celebrating freedom | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump delivers remarks from Mount Rushmore as the nation celebrates the 250th anniversary of American independence.

news-global-econ.title: Trump warns communism is a ‘mortal threat’ to American liberty | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump warns of the ‘threat’ of communism while speaking at Mount Rushmore for the 250th anniversary of America on ‘Fox & Friends.’

news-global-soc.title: Investors looking for shelter from AI storm are turning to India

news-global-soc.title: Trump: Netanyahu 'Knows Who the Boss Is’ as Leaders Plan White House Meeting
news-global-soc.description: President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu requested a White House meeting that could take place after the president returns from next week’s NATO summit, as the two leaders have differed over Iran diplomacy and Israel’s continued m…

news-global-soc.title: World leaders, dignitaries pay tribute to America on historic 250th birthday
news-global-soc.description: King Charles, Pope Leo XIV are among dozens of world leaders sending messages to Trump on America's 250th Independence Day. From Jerusalem to the UAE and Japan congratulations were sent.

news-global-soc.title: Pope Leo urges US to welcome immigrants in America 250 speech before visiting global migrant hotspot
news-global-soc.description: Pope Leo XIV accepted the 2026 Liberty Medal virtually from the Vatican before departing for Lampedusa to urge Europe to accept more migrants.

news-global-soc.title: Post Malone, Eva Marie Saint and other celebrities who share a birthday with the Fourth of July
news-global-soc.description: Post Malone turns 31 and headlines America's Salute 250 concert as he joins Mike Sorrentino, Malia Obama and others born on Independence Day.
